deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

accountDeletion.title: DELETE ACCOUNT
accountDeletion.description: This action cannot be undone. After deactivation, all related data will be permanently deleted after 7 days.
accountDeletion.confirm:
Are you sure you want to request account deletion?

Upon request, your account will be deactivated immediately and all data will be permanently deleted after 7 days.
accountDeletion.success: Deletion request has been processed successfully. Your account will be permanently deleted in 7 days.
accountDeletion.error: An error occurred while deleting the account: {{error}}
